entity.label: Shimei
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the sons of Heman, who assisted in the purification of the temple (2 Chr. 29:14).

nodes.label: Shimei
nodes.description: One of the sons of Heman, who assisted in the purification of the temple (2 Chr. 29:14).

verses.text: And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
